title: benstonea setistyla
intro: Benstonea setistyla, also known as the 'Tree of Life', is a plant species native to the tropical rainforests of Papua New Guinea and Indonesia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Benstonea setistyla often involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which is then used to treat various ailments.
